data.body:
PREREQUISITE REALIGNMENT — reflect recent codebase changes (2026-06). Same process as the plan-review (5fd2) + code-review-capability (b744) epics: inventoried the shipped foundations against this framework epic and corrected the description (new '## Prerequisite foundations' section + AC2/AC6 edits). Closed prerequisite epics NOT reopened.

KEY SHIFT — the reviewer migration is PARTLY done:
- da27 (closed) already migrated the existing reviewers (code_quality/security/tests/spec_alignment/ticket_quality/completion_verifier) to the front-matter CONTRACT model (inputs/outputs/execution_mode/dimension/applies_to + derived index + CI drift gate). That is the PROMPT-STORAGE half of 'migrate existing reviewers'.
- BUT they still emit the OLD pass-1 shape {findings:[{severity,dimension,detail,citations}],summary}, NOT this epic's pass-1 EVIDENCE contract {finding,criteria[],evidence[],scenarios[],impact}. So AC6 is now the pass-1-SHAPE + Pass-2/Pass-3 migration LAYERED on the already-contracted prompts, not a from-scratch rewrite.

OTHER SUBSTRATE NOW CONCRETE:
- findings.py (normalize_finding) + aggregate.py exist; review_code is SINGLE-PASS today (no Pass-2 verifier, no Pass-3 gate — both still NEW WORK here).
- Runner = PydanticAIRunner (e6d9; LangGraph cut over), honoring execution_mode; workflow engine + Inspect-AI eval seam shipped.
- Pass-2 RE-GROUNDING + the cited-reference VETO now have a substrate: the 8f6c grounding oracle (refute_absence/applies/scan). The overlay catalogs' 'Scanner pre-pass (Semgrep/Gitleaks/Trivy)' maps to the oracle's extensible detector registry (OpenGrep/ast-grep shipped); security/secrets/CVE detectors still pending (shared with b744).

This epic remains the shared three-pass FRAMEWORK that both plan-review (5fd2, adopts from here) and code-review (b744, depends_on here) build on.
